goal: Compare Cosine Annealing vs Step Decay learning rate schedules for a small CNN on CIFAR-10. Hypothesis: Cosine annealing converges to better test accuracy due to smoother loss landscape navigation. Use 3-layer CNN (Conv-BN-ReLU-Pool × 3 + FC), 3 seeds, 5 epochs, 2000 training samples. Measure final accuracy, best epoch accuracy, and training loss curves. Paired t-test.
